---
title: "English Church Union, The"
---

## English Church Union, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This organisation was founded in 1859 in protest at the government legislating on church matters.  It supported many of those accused of ritualism under the Public Worship Regulation Act (1874).  The organisation changed its name to the Church Union in 1933, and still exists as a High Church lobby group within the Church of England, currently (2009) resisting the arrival of women bishops. Some archives are held by Lambeth Palace Library. Its website is  http://www.churchunion.co.uk/

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
